note: Schema only — not a real headmate file. Copy this to create a new headmate.
name: headmate_name

baseline.note: Observed tendency, not a fixed trait. Confidence starts at 0.

observed_patterns.condition: what was happening when this was observed

departures.note: Example departure entry — when someone acts outside their baseline
departures.baseline_expectation: what we expected based on their pattern

moments_of_note: Example: showed unexpected steadiness during a hard conversation

corrections.note: Example correction — things Gizmo should do differently with this person
